focus: Full corpus categorization: 43 docs mapped to 7 natural design domains, coverage gaps identified, coupling signals analyzed

graphEvents.label: 7 natural design domain clusters identified in external corpus
designer-skills-main uses workflow-stage axis; standalone corpus uses craft-domain axis
HIGH coverage gaps: Layout, Motion, Accessibility, Interaction, Process
Each standalone doc designed with self-contained skill pattern (YAML, Register, workflow, prohibitions)

focus: Structural model analysis: hub vs umbrella, coupling signals, precedent analysis from existing opencode skills and designer-skills-main

graphEvents.label: Umbrella model strongly preferred over hub for 5-7 design sub-domains
Hub pattern works for 2-3 surfaces (sk-code) but fails for 5-7 with different workflows
deep-loop-workflows is the primary precedent for umbrella-over-siblings in opencode
designer-skills-main uses 9 independent plugins (not hub) — external evidence for umbrella model
Shared resources (design principles, register pattern) should live at parent level
Each corpus doc is self-contained by design — umbrella preserves this property

focus: Draft 6-candidate sub-skill taxonomy: visual, color, motion, layout, a11y, interaction — with scope, boundaries, corpus sources per child

graphEvents.label: 6 sub-skills proposed: visual, color, motion, layout, a11y, interaction
sk-design-interface naturally evolves into sk-design-visual (rename + expand)
sk-design-md-generator stays as extraction engine, consumed by sk-design-color
Process docs (critique, redesign) are cross-cutting — better as conditional refs than separate sub-skill
taste-skill.md is the richest corpus source (600+ lines) — feeds visual, color, layout, and motion
designer-skills-main interaction-design plugin has 16 skills including cognitive laws (Hicks, Millers, Fitts)

focus: Onboarding & backward compat: sk-design-interface rename scope, sk-design-md-generator update scope, per-child effort estimates, compatibility strategy

graphEvents.label: sk-design-interface rename to sk-design-visual: MEDIUM risk, 2-3 day effort
sk-design-md-generator needs minimal update (0.5 day), no rename
Total onboarding effort: 10-16 days across all sub-skills
Compatibility alias strategy: keep old name as redirect for 28-day migration window
sk-design-interface has 8 references + feature catalog + manual testing playbook to preserve

focus: Map designer-skills-main 97 skills to 6 sub-skills: ~55 absorbed, 46 process skills dropped, cognitive laws go to parent

graphEvents.label: ~55 of 97 designer-skills-main skills absorbed into 6 sub-skills
46 process skills (research, strategy, testing, ops) dropped — covered by existing opencode skills
8 cognitive/UX laws should live in parent shared references
sk-design-interaction absorbs the most (14 skills) from designer-skills-main

focus: Parent router logic: priority-ordered keyword detection, shared resources (principles, cognitive laws, conventions)

graphEvents.label: Parent uses priority-ordered keyword detection, defaults to sk-design-visual
Parent holds 3 shared resource groups: design-principles, cognitive-laws, conventions
Multi-skill dispatch via enhances edges, not parent-level composition

focus: Edge cases: full-design workflow routing, cross-cutting concerns (a11y, responsive, dark mode), delight ambiguity, extraction bypass

graphEvents.label: Full design tasks route to sk-design-visual as gateway, which dispatches to siblings
Accessibility rules belong in parent shared references (quality floor), a11y sub-skill owns audit/fix
sk-design-md-generator bypasses parent router — direct entry point for extraction
Delight routes to sk-design-interaction, which references sk-design-motion for animation

focus: Final convergence: all 7 key questions answered, newInfoRatio declining, quality guards passing, ready for synthesis

graphEvents.label: Research converged: 7/7 questions answered, newInfoRatio trend 0.95->0.35
6 sub-skills confirmed: visual, color, motion, layout, a11y, interaction
Umbrella model confirmed with 6 evidence points
Total onboarding effort: 10-16 days with backward compat strategy
